steps.title: Identify the core signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is in “Our deeper content was never spoken, / But each knew all the other said.” This establishes that the two companions understand each other completely without explicit communication.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly captures the signal—the unspoken connection between speaker and friend. A, B, and C each miss this: one lists sights, one invents an attraction-repulsion dynamic with nature, one misreads the title. That matches choice D — D is correct.
